title: PALIMPSEST interchange claim
description: FROZEN CONTRACT (ARCHITECTURE §2). Version 0.1.0. Governs every claim that crosses a process boundary: adapter → engine import, action requests that create claims, analytics write-back. Adapters pin the version they emit; the engine validates and rejects unknown majors. PROVENANCE: authored fresh per deviation DEV-001 (the Phase-0 artifact was not available); faithful to ARCHITECTURE §2/§5/§13.3, not a byte-identical restoration.
$comment: schema_version 0.1.0. The root schema is a claim (so 'claim.schema.json governs every claim' holds literally and the sample-claims fixture validates against the root). The entity-import record is $defs/entityRecord; the engine validates kind=entities lines against it.

method_detail.description: For method=inferred: algorithm + parameters. For extracted: model + version. Rendered in the evidence panel (W9).

asserted_by.description: Agent slug (e.g. 'pipeline', 'scholar', a model slug). The engine resolves it to an agent row and stamps the assert event (ADR-005).

support.description: ≥1 support link (I4). Each carries the verbatim upstream source_record so lineage is complete (Flow C). Records are upserted by (source, record_kind, external_id); an identical content_hash is a duplicate/no-op, a differing one supersedes.

entityRef.description: Authority-qualified external id. The engine resolves it; an unresolvable ref rejects the containing claim (I6).

claimObject.description: Exactly one of entity | literal (mirrors the store CHECK claim_object_exactly_one).

authority.description: For kind=external-id: the naming authority (e.g. 'odnb'). A has-external-id claim, NOT an identity anchor.

fuzzyInterval.description: Four-date fuzzy valid-time model (§13.3). Any bound may be null (unknown). The source's native encoding is preserved verbatim under 'original' and is never destroyed. 'approximate' is the circa marker — no invented ±window (§17.2 S3).

nullableDate.description: ISO date YYYY-MM-DD (leading '-' permitted for completeness), or null when the bound is unknown.

confidence.description: Source-native scalar in [0,1], OR unscored (absence — no invented number, I5). 'unscored' MUST NOT carry a point.

raw.description: The source's own value verbatim, e.g. 97.

calibrated.description: Import-time confidence is never calibrated; calibration is a Phase-3 run (§6.2).

method.description: Provenance method. Import uses 'imported'; ER writes 'inferred'; scholarly writes 'manual'; text extraction 'extracted'.

supportRecord.description: A verbatim source record. The importer upserts source_record by (source, record_kind, external_id) and links it to the claim.

raw.description: Verbatim upstream payload for this record (Flow C).

entityRecord.description: Import kind=entities line. Creates an entity and its identity-bearing 1:1 authority anchors (entity_external_id). Entities are created ONLY here or by explicit action — never as a side effect of a relation (I6). Names, gender, descriptions and many-to-one ids (ODNB) are separate CLAIMS, not fields here.

external_ids.description: Identity-bearing 1:1 anchors only. For SDFB, only the 'sdfb' authority.
